title: Add a DefaultNetwork field to NetworkInfo
body:
<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

containers/podman#27580

To address this issue, we added the DefaultNetwork field to the NetworkInfo structure.

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6534**
